thi3:1.0.39: p_19Th2_70"Paṇṇavīsativassāni,yato pabbajitāya me;Nābhijānāmi cittassa,samaṁ laddhaṁ kudācanaṁ.
thi3:1.0.40: p_19Th2_71Aladdhā cetaso santiṁ,citte avasavattinī;Tato saṁvegamāpādiṁ,saritvā jinasāsanaṁ.
thi3:1.0.41: p_19Th2_72Bahūhi dukkhadhammehi,appamādaratāya me;Taṇhakkhayo anuppatto,kataṁ buddhassa sāsanaṁ;Ajja me sattamī ratti,yato taṇhā visositā"ti.
thi3:1.0.42: p_19Th2_74"Catukkhattuṁ pañcakkhattuṁ,vihārā upanikkhamiṁ;Aladdhā cetaso santiṁ,citte avasavattinī.
thi3:1.0.43: p_19Th2_75Sā bhikkhuniṁ upagacchiṁ,yā me saddhāyikā ahu;Sā me dhammamadesesi,khandhāyatanadhātuyo.
thi3:1.0.44: p_19Th2_76Tassā dhammaṁ suṇitvāna,Yathā maṁ anusāsi sā;Sattāhaṁ ekapallaṅkena,Nisīdiṁpītisukhasamappitā;Aṭṭhamiyā pāde pasāresiṁ,Tamokhandhaṁ padāliyā"ti.
thi3:1.0.45: p_19Th2_78"Ye ime satta bojjhaṅgā,maggā nibbānapattiyā;Bhāvitā te mayā sabbe,yathā buddhena desitā.
thi3:1.0.47: p_19Th2_80Sabbe kāmā samucchinnā,ye dibbā ye ca mānusā;Vikkhīṇo jātisaṁsāro,natthi dāni punabbhavo"ti.
thi3:1.0.49: p_19Th2_83Puriso aṅkusamādāya,‘dehi pādan’ti yācati;Nāgo pasārayī pādaṁ,puriso nāgamāruhi.
thi3:1.0.50: p_19Th2_84Disvā adantaṁ damitaṁ,manussānaṁ vasaṁ gataṁ;Tato cittaṁ samādhesiṁ,khalu tāya vanaṁ gatā"ti.
thi3:1.0.51: p_19Th2_86"Amma jīvāti vanamhi kandasi,Attānaṁ adhigaccha ubbiri;Cullāsītisahassāni,Sabbā jīvasanāmikā;Etamhāḷāhane daḍḍhā,Tāsaṁ kamanusocasi".
thi3:1.0.52: p_19Th2_87"Abbahīvata me sallaṁ,duddasaṁhadayassitaṁ;Yaṁ me sokaparetāya,dhītusokaṁ byapānudi.
thi3:1.0.53: p_19Th2_88Sājja abbūḷhasallāhaṁ,Nicchātā parinibbutā;Buddhaṁ dhammañca saṁghañca,Upemi saraṇaṁ munin"ti.
thi3:1.0.54: p_19Th2_90"Kiṁmekatā rājagahe manussā,Madhuṁ pītāvaacchare;Ye sukkaṁ na upāsanti,Desentiṁ buddhasāsanaṁ.
thi3:1.0.56: p_19Th2_92Sukkā sukkehi dhammehi,vītarāgā samāhitā;Dhāreti antimaṁ dehaṁ,jetvā māraṁ savāhinin"ti.
thi3:1.0.57: p_19Th2_94"Natthi nissaraṇaṁ loke,kiṁ vivekena kāhasi;Bhuñjāhi kāmaratiyo,māhu pacchānutāpinī".
thi3:1.0.58: p_19Th2_95"Sattisūlūpamā kāmā,khandhāsaṁ adhikuṭṭanā;Yaṁ tvaṁ ‘kāmaratiṁ’ brūsi,‘aratī’ dāni sā mama.
thi3:1.0.59: p_19Th2_96Sabbattha vihatānandī,Tamokhandho padālito;Evaṁ jānāhi pāpima,Nihato tvamasi antakā"ti.
thi3:1.0.60: p_19Th2_98"Yaṁ taṁ isīhi pattabbaṁ,ṭhānaṁ durabhisambhavaṁ;Na taṁ dvaṅgulapaññāya,sakkā pappotumitthiyā".
thi3:1.0.61: p_19Th2_99"Itthibhāvo no kiṁ kayirā,cittamhi susamāhite;Ñāṇamhi vattamānamhi,sammā dhammaṁ vipassato.
thi3:1.0.62: p_19Th2_100Sabbattha vihatānandī,Tamokhandho padālito;Evaṁ jānāhi pāpima,Nihato tvamasi antakā"ti.
